reforms.description: The Danish government established a risk capital market for entrepreneurs and made an entrepreneurial support scheme permanent, aimed at enhancing the entrepreneurial climate and addressing market failures in the supply of risk capital to SMEs, facilitating access to funding for innovative startups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating access to funding for innovative startups is expected to enhance entrepreneurship and innovation, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Both initiatives have been successfully established and are operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a risk capital market and a permanent support scheme represents significant but not structural changes to the entrepreneurial ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: An entrepreneurial support scheme has been made permanent, and has been followed by government intervention to establish a market for subordinate loan capital to enterprises.

reforms.description: The Danish government established a framework for improving competition in the rail transport sector, which includes measures to enhance innovation in the sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing competition and innovation in the rail transport sector is expected to improve efficiency and service quality, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The framework has been established and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a framework for competition and innovation represents a significant change in the governance of the rail transport sector.
reforms.source_quote: Parliament adopts a framework for improving competition in the rail transport sector.
